title: HistoricalAccountData
description: Individual account balance within a historical daily snapshot.

cash.description: Cash balance in the account's native currency.

investedAmount.description: Invested amount in the account's native currency.

pnl.description: Profit and loss in the account's native currency.

total.description: Total balance in the account's native currency.

displayCash.description: Cash balance converted to the requested display currency.

displayInvestedAmount.description: Invested amount converted to the requested display currency.

displayPnl.description: Profit and loss converted to the requested display currency.

displayTotal.description: Total balance converted to the requested display currency.

exchangeRate.description: Exchange rate applied to convert to displayCurrency.
